rootCauseAnalysis.claim: All practice exams besides global and us regents and AP psychology seem broken.
rootCauseAnalysis.verdict: PARTIALLY DISPROVED — the engine and DOM scaffold were already at full parity; only the per-question topic labels in 8 exams were too granular, producing a noisy, fragmented mastery rollup on the results screen that looked broken next to the gold standards.
details: Headless browser test of all 52 per-course practice-exam.html files reported ZERO console errors, ZERO page errors, ZERO 404s, ZERO fatal load failures BEFORE the fix.

All 52 exams share the IDENTICAL HTML scaffold (startBtn, examShell, examStage, scorePill, flash, topicStatus, downloadPdfBtn) and IDENTICAL asset references (CSS, JS includes) — byte-for-byte except for the const QUESTIONS array, titleblock kicker/h1/subtitle, examStatus pill text, STORAGE_KEY, and Past Exams ID.

All 52 exams successfully start, render a real question (10 chars+ prompt, 4 choices), accept a clicked answer, show feedback with the correct explanation, and advance to a different question on clicking Next.
All 52 exams have a working results screen (verified via fast-forward script): score, per-topic mastery breakdown, Restart Exam button, View Past Exams button, Review Wrong Answers button.
Past-exam library entries exist for ALL 52 course slugs in data/public-exam-library.json (53 entries indexed).
Format-compliance audit (scripts/audit-format-compliance.mjs) reports 0 errors. Practice-exam audit (scripts/audit-practice-exams.mjs) reports OK on every file.

ROOT CAUSE: 8 exams had fragmented per-question topic labels (e.g. 'Polynomials: End Behavior', 'Polynomials: Remainder Theorem', 'Polynomials: Synthetic Division' — one question per topic). The gold standards use unit-level topics (e.g. 'Unit 1: Biological Bases of Behavior') with 3-8 questions clustering under each. The fragmented labels produced a results-screen mastery breakdown with 27-45 rows, each showing '1/1' — visually broken compared to the gold standards' 5-12 rows showing meaningful 3-8 question buckets.
rootCauseAnalysis.fixApplied: scripts/consolidate-fragmented-topics.mjs — rewrites per-question topic labels in 8 fragmented exams to roll up to official AP CED unit names (AP Calc BC, AP Eng Lang) or NYS Regents module names (Algebra II, Geometry) or NYS CCSS strands (Grade 5/7/8 ELA) or passage groupings (AP Eng Lit). 266 topic-line rewrites total. The QUESTIONS array shape, ids, prompts, choices, correctText, and explanations are unchanged.

dimensionsChecked.JSEngineFunctions: shuffledIndices, renderQuestion, renderResults, renderIntro, flash, shuffledChoices, saveState, clearState, pct, gradeBand, goToHub all present in every exam
dimensionsChecked.DOMScaffold: startBtn, examShell, examStage, scorePill, flash, topicStatus, hubBtn, downloadPdfBtn — verified present in all 52
dimensionsChecked.AssetReferences: Identical across all 52: 0 byte-diff for href/src across files
dimensionsChecked.QuestionsArrayShape: id, topic, prompt, choices (4-wide), correctText (matches a choice), explanation — verified for all 52
dimensionsChecked.QuestionsArrayLength: Distribution: 7 exams=30Q, 4 exams=35Q, 34 exams=40Q, 7 exams=45Q (all within spec range 30-45)
dimensionsChecked.correctIdxNormalization: QUESTIONS.forEach((q) => { q.correctIdx = q.choices.indexOf(q.correctText); }); present in all 52 (verified via probe q.correctIdx === number)
dimensionsChecked.PastExamsButton: MrMacPastExams.open('<slug>') wired on intro AND results screens for all 52
dimensionsChecked.MobileResponsive: All 52 share the same @media print + CSS — gold standard renders correctly at 414×800, others use the same CSS
dimensionsChecked.TopicDistributionAfterFix: All 52 exams now have 3-12 unit-level topics with 3-25 questions per topic, matching the gold-standard pattern
dimensionsChecked.ResultsScreen: Score + mastery breakdown + Restart + Review Wrong Answers + View Past Exams all render for every exam tested

buckets: Module 4: Connecting Algebra + Geometry through Coordinates (5Q)
Module 5: Circles With and Without Coordinates (5Q)

filesUnchanged: 44 per-course practice exams were already at full parity with the gold standards. No changes made to those files. Listed in 'filesAtFullParityPrePass' below.
